name: @hansjm10/volt-coding-agent
description: Coding agent CLI with read, bash, edit, write, web_search tools and session management

scripts.build: tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && shx chmod +x dist/cli.js && npm run copy-assets
scripts.build:binary: npm --prefix ../tui run build && npm --prefix ../ai run build && npm --prefix ../agent run build && npm run build && node ../../scripts/build-standalone.mjs
scripts.copy-assets: shx mkdir -p dist/core/theme && shx cp src/core/theme/*.json dist/core/theme/ && shx mkdir -p dist/core/export-html/vendor && shx cp src/core/export-html/template.html src/core/export-html/template.css src/core/export-html/template.js dist/core/export-html/ && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/core/export-html/vendor/ && shx mkdir -p dist/remote && shx cp src/remote/*.cjs dist/remote/ && npm run copy-third-party-licenses
scripts.copy-third-party-licenses: shx mkdir -p dist/LICENSES && shx cp ../../node_modules/clipboard-image/license dist/LICENSES/clipboard-image-MIT.txt && shx cp ../../node_modules/run-jxa/license dist/LICENSES/run-jxa-MIT.txt && shx cp ../../node_modules/highlight.js/LICENSE dist/LICENSES/highlight.js-10.7.3-BSD-3-Clause.txt && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/highlight.LICENSE dist/LICENSES/highlight.js-11.9.0-BSD-3-Clause.txt && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/marked.LICENSE dist/LICENSES/marked-18.0.5-LICENSE.txt
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run shrinkwrap
